steps: wait patiently for landlord to make a decision
landlord reveals the good news to accept tenant
landlord meets with new tenants again
hand over deposit and first month rent check
loop_step: wait patiently for landlord to make a decision
descriptions: the landlord has not yet called
the rental listing is still active online
the landlord sends a text asking to verify your previous address
the tenant’s cell phone rings and the caller ID shows the landlord’s number
the period of uncertainty concludes as the decision-maker initiates a call
the tenant's memory of the landlord's promise to call by Friday aligns with the phone's sudden alert on Thursday evening
The tenant's phone buzzes with a spam text about an extended car warranty during the call.
A neighbor's wind chimes clink faintly in the breeze while the tenant waits.

steps: Remember where the car is parked
Lift right leg up off the ground
Extend right leg forward in the direction of the car
Lift left leg up off the ground
Extend left leg forward in the direction of the car
Continue lifting and extending legs until arrival at the car
loop_step: Continue lifting and extending legs until arrival at the car
descriptions: the car is still several steps away
the silhouette of the apartment building still looms behind you
the faint smell of the building's lobby carpet still hangs in the air
the person is close enough to reach out and touch the car
the person's breath fogs the car's window
the skin on their cheeks tightens from the cold radiating off the glass, making them instinctively stop and exhale in relief
The sun reflects off a nearby building's windows, casting a warm light on the sidewalk.
A distant siren briefly wails and then fades into the city noise.
the tracking information still reads 'In Transit
the front door camera hasn't alerted me to any motion
the dog hasn't barked once this afternoon
the tracking information updates to show "Delivered" with a timestamp
a notification arrives confirming the package has been left at the doorstep
the latest entry on the tracking page no longer displays an estimated time of arrival but instead shows a static location marker at the destination address
The front porch has a wooden swing next to the door.
A light drizzle is falling outside.

steps: wait for the paperwork to be approved
received certified mail with notarized licenses
order food for the new animal
descriptions: the transport truck’s GPS still shows it two states away
the custom-fit halter with the animal’s name tag still hangs untouched on the hook by the unloading chute
the sticky note on the office calendar still reads "Call vet after arrival" in yesterday's handwriting
the sound of a large vehicle engine accompanied by the sight of the transport company's truck with the matching license plate number pulling into the facility's designated unloading bay
the dispatch tracking app pinged with an "arrived" status update and the facility's external intercom emitted the driver's muffled voice asking for the loading dock to be opened

the voice on the intercom carried the faint background squeal of air brakes releasing, a sound that only occurs when the truck has fully stopped and engaged its parking brake at the dock, confirming the app's alert was not a false track and the driver was physically present at the door
A faint smell of hay lingers in the storage room, though it's currently empty.
The facility's wall clock ticks audibly, its hands pointing to the late afternoon.

steps: Stop in front of the refrigerator
Reach hand toward the refrigerator door
Begin pulling on the refrigerator door
Continue pulling until the door is opened
loop_step: Continue pulling until the door is opened
descriptions: the interior light hasn't switched on
the slight but constant tug of the magnetic seal persists
the magnetic seal breaks with a slight pop and the door swings freely away from the frame
the door’s resistance suddenly gives way
a sliver of light from the interior spills onto the floor near your feet
The kitchen floor is made of beige tiles with a few faint scuff marks near the sink
A faint hum comes from the refrigerator's compressor, unchanged regardless of door position

steps: Start car and drive to zoo
descriptions: all visible parking spots are occupied
you spot the same car circling past you for the third time
you haven't seen anyone walking with keys in hand toward a parked car
an empty parking space is spotted
a vehicle's reverse lights illuminate and it begins to back out of a parking space

a moment before, the distinct thud of a car door shutting came from that direction, and given that the vehicle is wedged between two others without room to creep forward, shifting into reverse almost certainly means the occupant has returned and is about to vacate the space entirely
The scent of freshly mown grass mixes with the distant sound of animal calls.
A light drizzle begins to dot the windshield as you pull into the parking lot.

steps: place pot with water on stove
place a lid on the pot
allow the water to get hot
wait for the water to boil
add salt to the water and stir
loop_step: wait for the water to boil
descriptions: the water is still and no bubbles are rising to the surface
the kitchen window remains clear of fog
the unopened box of noodles sits on the counter
large bubbles are rapidly rising to the surface and breaking
the surface agitation has become violent and unrelenting
the sporadic clinking of the lid has been replaced by a continuous, faint hiss and tremor
The kitchen smells faintly of the bread that was toasted earlier.
A refrigerator hums softly in the background.

steps: pull into the store parking lot
descriptions: the nearest rows are completely full
no other cars are pulling out of spaces
the only motion is a shopping cart drifting slowly across the asphalt
an empty parking space is spotted
a gap in the otherwise solid line of parked cars becomes apparent
a car's reversing lights suddenly snuff out and a puff of exhaust marks the spot where it just stood
The store's ventilation hums softly in the background.
A faint trace of perfume lingers near the jacket rack.

steps: wait for employee to verify tickets
loop_step: wait for employee to verify tickets
descriptions: the employee is still holding the tickets up to the light
the employee's lips are pursed in concentration
the tickets look slightly worn at the edges
the employee returns the ticket stubs and gestures for you to proceed through the turnstile
a series of short, high-pitched beeps comes from the scanning device
the employee's thumb, which had been resting on the reject stamp, now moves to the side as they exhale audibly
The arena's massive LED screen flashes advertisements for upcoming concerts and monster truck rallies.
A group of rowdy fans behind you keeps singing a loud, off-key fight song.

steps: wait for computer to turn on
press enter to log in to the laptop
move cursor towards music app icon
loop_step: wait for computer to turn on
descriptions: the screen is still dark and no startup sound has played
the caps lock light remains unchanged after pressing the key
the fan vents expel no air
the login screen appears on the laptop display
the screen transitions from a loading animation to a static state featuring a blinking text cursor
the rhythmic flickering of the disk activity indicator ceases, indicating the operating system has completed loading its core components and is now idle, awaiting user input
The laptop lid is covered in faded sticker residue from old decals.
A faint scent of coffee lingers in the air around the desk.

scenario: tell the barber what haircut to receive
steps: take seat and wait for barber
get called up to barber chair
take seat in front of mirror
tell the barber what haircut to receive
loop_step: take seat and wait for barber
descriptions: the barber is still working on another client
the buzz of electric clippers continues from the barber area
the reflection in the mirror shows an empty barber chair and a freshly swept floor
the scent of talcum powder reaches the waiting area
The sound of clippers buzzing blends with classic rock on the radio.
A faint scent of aftershave and talcum powder fills the air.

scenario: Let the attendees into the party
steps: Order hundreds of drinks to venue
Wait for the attendees to arrive
Walk over to the door of the venue
Listen for a knock at the door
Open the door to let the attendees in
Let the attendees into the party
Repeat until all the attendees have arrived
loop_step: Repeat until all the attendees have arrived
descriptions: there are still attendees waiting outside the door
the stack of name badges at the entrance still has several left
the sealed box of blank badges under the registration table hasn't been opened yet
no more knocks are heard for five minutes after the last arrival
the hallway beyond the door settles into an undisturbed quiet that stretches long enough to confirm the stream of arrivals has ended

the pattern of muffled footsteps that had grown sparser and sparser now leaves no fresh wet leaf prints on the mat outside the peephole, and even the building’s elevator stays silent for longer than any earlier pause between arrivals
The venue’s neon sign flickers slightly as the evening turns to night.
A batch of sparkling water bottles has been chilling in the fridge since noon.
every parking spot in view is currently taken
every marked bay contains a vehicle centered between its lines
the gaps between cars are just wide enough for doors to open, never wide enough for another vehicle to fit
an empty parking space comes into view
a continuous row of car roofs is broken by a gap showing the ground markings beneath
the reverse lights of a parked car illuminate among the rows, hinting that its space will soon be free
A flock of pigeons is pecking at something on the pavement near the lot.
The zoo's entrance archway is adorned with colorful animal sculptures.
